'''Hakassi''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]].

==History==
In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], Hakassi still was under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] control. After his [[Battle of Centares (Galactic Civil War)|defeat]] during the [[Post–Zsinj campaigns|Post-Zsinj campaign]], [[High Admiral]] [[Treuten Teradoc]] fled in the Deep Core and made Hakassi his capital. Like other Deep Core systems, the [[Hakassi system/Legends|Hakassi system]] was probably abandoned after the [[Imperial Reunification]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]].<ref name="TEA" />

Circa [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], Hakassi had become a member world of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. At least one major New Republic [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] was located there, which was responsible for producing several [[New Class Modernization Program|New Class]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]] for the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group]], including the [[Intrepid (Endurance-class)|''Intrepid'']].<ref name="TCSWE" />

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Attack on Hakassi|conquered]] Hakassi in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]. In response to the failed [[Second Battle of Bilbringi|Operation Trinity]], the Yuuzhan Vong launched an offensive against New Republic shipyards, the Hakassi and [[Kuat Drive Yards Orbital Array|Kuat shipyards]] were first targeted.<ref name="TEGtW" />
